testCases.title: CMS Design — Content Module in Admin Navigation
testCases.notes: Content navigation item visible in admin left sidebar. Content module accessible at /#!/workspace. Manages CMS pages, content items, design themes.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Theme Management
testCases.notes: Per project memory (reference_theme_presets.md): vc-frontend theme presets include 6 light + 3 dark themes. QA uses Coffee theme. Theme configuration managed via admin Content/Design module. Color token structure documented.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Coffee Theme Active on Storefront
testCases.notes: QA environment uses Coffee theme (per project memory). Storefront renders with Coffee theme CSS. Theme consistency verified across all pages: catalog, PDP, cart, account.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Storefront Header Design
testCases.notes: Header contains: logo/brand (QA store), search bar, account icon, cart icon, ship-to selector. Header design consistent with Coffee theme. Header sticky on scroll.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Storefront Footer Design
testCases.notes: Footer contains 6 sections: Account details, About us, Popular categories, Online resources, External links, Customer support, Brands. Footer design consistent with Coffee theme. All sections render correctly.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Builder.io Content Integration
testCases.notes: Per project CLAUDE.md and docs/prompts/How to test Builder.io.md: Builder.io CMS integration active. builderSessionId cookie present (from SEC-AUTH-001 verification). Builder.io and Virto Pages are separate CMS systems co-existing.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Demo Landing Page Layout
testCases.notes: /demo-landing page accessible from footer 'Online resources' section. CMS-managed landing page with custom design. Page title pattern 'QA & Demo Landing' (per CMS-011).

testCases.title: CMS Design — Category Page Design
testCases.notes: Category pages (/catalog, /kitchen-supplies) render with consistent grid layout. Facet sidebar on left. Product cards with image, name, price, Add to Cart button. Design matches Coffee theme.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Product Detail Page Design
testCases.notes: PDP renders with: product image gallery, name, SKU, price, variations (configurable hat), Add to Cart button, product description. Design consistent across product types.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Account Pages Design
testCases.notes: Account pages: left sidebar navigation (Profile, Orders, Quotes, Company, Addresses, Lists, Wishlists, Coupons & promotions). Main content area with page-specific content. Consistent design pattern.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Cart Page Design
testCases.notes: Cart page (/cart): line items on left, ORDER SUMMARY sidebar on right, DISCOUNT & COUPONS section, QUOTE REQUEST section, SHIPPING DETAILS, payment method selector. Single-page checkout design (checkout_multistep_enabled=off).

testCases.title: CMS Design — 404 Page Design
testCases.notes: 'QA & 404 Page not found' — custom 404 page with CMS design. No stack trace exposed. No server data revealed. Consistent theme applied to error page.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Content Blocks in Admin
testCases.notes: Per project memory (feedback_designer_block_workflow.md): Designer blocks accessible via tune icon (not right-click context menu). Blocks must be added via library click-through. Never use REST API for content management.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Page Title Consistency
testCases.notes: All storefront pages follow 'QA & <PageName>' title pattern: 'QA & Cart', 'QA & Catalog', 'QA & 404 Page not found'. CMS/theme setting applies consistent QA prefix store-wide.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Responsive Design (Desktop 1920x1080)
testCases.notes: All pages tested at 1920x1080 viewport (MCP config default). Layouts render correctly at desktop viewport. Sidebar, header, footer display as expected. No horizontal scroll or layout overflow.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Create Content Block via Admin UI
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Creating new content block via Admin Content > Designer deferred. Requires entering admin CMS editor which may affect live storefront content.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Edit Theme Settings
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Editing theme color tokens or preset settings via admin deferred. Changes would affect storefront appearance for all users.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Mobile Responsive Design
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Mobile viewport (375x667) rendering not tested. MCP config uses 1920x1080 fixed viewport. Mobile responsive testing deferred to compatibility suite (048).

testCases.title: CMS Design — Dark/Light Theme Toggle
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Theme toggle functionality (if available) not tested. QA environment uses Coffee (light) theme only per project memory (feedback_a11y_coffee_only.md).

testCases.title: CMS Design — Content Versioning
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Content version history for design assets deferred. Admin Content versioning UI not navigated to avoid potential state changes.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Admin vs Builder.io Content Boundary
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Distinguishing which design elements are managed by Admin CMS vs Builder.io requires accessing admin Content module and comparing with Builder.io dashboard. Not distinguishable from storefront inspection alone.

testCases.title: CMS Design — Custom Brand/White-Label Design
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: White-label design configuration (custom logos, colors, themes) per suite 067 (White Labeling Admin). Design customization boundary between CMS and white-labeling admin not inspected.
